SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers

Class SaveFileManager

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Helpers.SaveFileManager
public final class SaveFileManager extends Object
Handles battery-backed save files for cartridge RAM.

    Description

    DeleteSave(ROM rom)
    Deletes the managed save file and any legacy alias for a ROM.

  • Method Details

    • LoadSave

      public static Optional<byte[]> LoadSave(ROM rom)
      Loads save RAM for a ROM when a save file is available.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      Returns:
      save bytes when present

    • LoadSave

      public static Optional<byte[]> LoadSave(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity)
      Loads save RAM for a tracked game identity when a save file is available.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      Returns:
      save bytes when present

    • Save

      public static void Save(ROM rom, byte[] saveData)
      Writes the supplied save RAM to disk for the active ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      saveData - raw cartridge save bytes

    • Save

      public static void Save(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity, byte[] saveData)
      Writes the supplied save RAM to disk for a tracked game identity.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      saveData - raw cartridge save bytes

    • PreferredSavePath

      public static Path PreferredSavePath(ROM rom)
      Returns the managed save path for a ROM using the preferred display title.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      Returns:
      preferred save path

    • PreferredSavePath

      public static Path PreferredSavePath(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity)
      Returns the managed save path for a tracked game identity.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      Returns:
      preferred save path

    • LegacySavePath

      public static Path LegacySavePath(ROM rom)
      Returns the legacy save path based on the original ROM filename.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      Returns:
      legacy save path

      public static Path LegacySavePath(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity)
      Returns the legacy save path based on the original game filename.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      Returns:
      legacy save path

      Returns:

    • DeleteSave

      public static void DeleteSave(ROM rom) throws IOException
      Deletes the managed save file and any legacy alias for a ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      Throws:
      IOException - when deletion fails

    • DeleteSave

      public static void DeleteSave(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity) throws IOException
      Deletes the managed save file and any legacy alias for a tracked game.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      Throws:
      IOException - when deletion fails

    • ImportSave

      public static byte[] ImportSave(ROM rom, Path sourcePath) throws IOException
      Imports an external save file into the managed location for a ROM.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      sourcePath - external save file
      Returns:
      imported save bytes
      Throws:
      IOException - when the file cannot be read or written

    • ImportSave

      public static byte[] ImportSave(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity, Path sourcePath) throws IOException
      Imports an external save file into the managed location for a tracked game.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      sourcePath - external save file
      Returns:
      imported save bytes
      Throws:
      IOException - when the file cannot be read or written

    • ExportSave

      public static void ExportSave(byte[] saveData, Path destinationPath) throws IOException
      Writes a save snapshot to an arbitrary external path.
      Parameters:
      saveData - raw save bytes
      destinationPath - destination file path
      Throws:
      IOException - when the file cannot be written

    • ExportSave

      public static void ExportSave(ROM rom, Path destinationPath) throws IOException
      Copies an existing managed save file to an arbitrary external path.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      destinationPath - destination file path
      Throws:
      IOException - when the file cannot be read or written

    • ExportSave

      public static void ExportSave(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity, Path destinationPath) throws IOException
      Copies an existing managed save file to an arbitrary external path.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      destinationPath - destination file path
      Throws:
      IOException - when the file cannot be read or written

    • ResolveExistingSavePath

      public static Optional<Path> ResolveExistingSavePath(ROM rom)
      Returns the existing managed or legacy save path when one is present.
      Parameters:
      rom - active ROM
      Returns:
      existing save path

    • ResolveExistingSavePath

      public static Optional<Path> ResolveExistingSavePath(SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity saveIdentity)
      Returns the existing managed or legacy save path when one is present.
      Parameters:
      saveIdentity - tracked save identity
      Returns:
      existing save path
